summary: 0.6.35 tightens A-B transport behavior so A-B clears on manual movie navigation and scrub seeks stay inside the active A-B window.
operatorSignals: A-B should clear when navigating to another movie.
Scrubbing should stay inside the active A-B range.
actionsTaken: Cleared A-B state when manual next or previous transport changes the current playlist item.
Clamped shared seek targets into the active A-B range while A-B is enabled.
